description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved gilteritinib as a treatment option for the treatment of adult patients who have relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukaemia (AML) with a FLT3 mutation. In the event that patients re-initiate gilteritinib post haematopoietic stem cell transplant (HSCT) as maintenance therapy, gilteritinib treatment should be restricted to patients who are minimal residual disease (MRD)-positive post-transplant.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

indication.indication: As monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients who have relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukaemia (AML) with a FLT3 mutation. In the event that patients re-initiate gilteritinib post haematopoietic stem cell transplant (HSCT) as maintenance therapy, gilteritinib treatment should be restricted to patients who are minimal residual disease (MRD)-positive post-transplant.
